name: Veilmaw
description: A floating spectral jaw that phases through walls and bites things it probably shouldn't. Middling in every way, unsettling in every way.

moves.name: 👻 Phantom Bite
moves.desc: Phases through defenses for a direct ghostly chomp.

moves.name: 🩸 Soul Drain
moves.desc: Siphons life energy from the enemy.

moves.name: 😱 Haunt
moves.desc: Whispers terrifying things. Confuses and unnerves the enemy.

moves.name: 💤 Nightmare Spore
moves.desc: Releases spores that cause vivid nightmares. High sleep chance.

moves.name: 📈 Veil Step
moves.desc: Slips between dimensions, sharpening reflexes. Speed rises.

moves.name: 📉 Dread Gaze
moves.desc: Hollow eye contact weakens the enemy's will. Lowers ATK.

moves.name: ⚡ Ecto Pulse
moves.desc: Fires a burst of ectoplasmic energy. May paralyze.

moves.name: 💊 Phase Heal
moves.desc: Phases into the spirit realm briefly, returning restored.
